calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-30-2011 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-05-2011 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-05-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Tomar Mason, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: B. Fields, #7235

Marc , Esq. for Plaintiff: Systems One Accquistion Development, Inc.
Plaintiff's Witness was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendant Ramiro Cardenas and Lorena Cardenas at TRIAL CALL, but was late appearing in Dept. 514 and stipulated for an ENTRY of JUDGMENT.

Pursuant to the stipulation by the parties, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendants for Judgment as follows:

Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 969 Sutter Street, San Francisco, CA.
The lease is forfeited.
Holdover Damages - $8,186.29
Costs - $733.50
Other Costs - $971.49
Total - $9,891.28, stayed of execution through Jan. 2, 2012

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
